---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="proj-grid">
  <div class="proj-card">
    <h3>LOAD Endotyping (non‑APOE ε4)</h3>
    <p>Clustering + generative modeling to identify biological subtypes and mechanisms of heterogeneity.</p>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>Data: NACC UDS + NP + genetics modules</li>
      <li>Methods: feature harmonization, contrastive reps, mixture models</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  
  <div class="proj-card">
    <h3>Cognitive Support Chatbot</h3>
    <p>Adaptive, recall‑based dialogue with spaced repetition for memory support.</p>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>Design: ReMe‑inspired prompts, emotion‑aware adjustments</li>
      <li>Eval: A/B vs. baseline prompting</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  
  <div class="proj-card">
    <h3>BCI Finger Flexion</h3>
    <p>Windowed time‑domain features + LightGBM ensembles for ECoG decoding.</p>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>Features: line length, Hjorth, spectral entropy</li>
      <li>Result: faster inference, strong Pearson r</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
  <div class="proj-card">
    <h3>Multimodal Breast Cancer Classification</h3>
    <p>ViT + BERT fusion outperforming single-modality models.</p>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>25% accuracy improvement</li>
      <li>Advanced hyperparameter tuning</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-card">
    <h3>MRI Brain Tissue Segmentation</h3>
    <p>nnU-Net pipeline for ex-vivo MRI segmentation.</p>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>Dice: GM 0.91, WM 0.89, CSF 0.88</li>
      <li>Bias correction + patch extraction</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-card">
    <h3>Generative AI for Clinical Notes</h3>
    <p>Fine-tuned LLM extracting cognitive + behavioral signals.</p>
    <ul class="bullets">
      <li>Extracts memory complaints</li>
      <li>Integrates LLM features into multimodal models</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>
```
